title: cyperus iria var. santonici
intro: Cyperus iria var. santonici, also known as santo cyperus, is a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of santo cyperus include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of santo cyperus include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
